## Summary

Describe the focused change in a few sentences.

## Why

Explain the problem this change solves and link any related issue.

## Evidence and behavior

Describe user-visible behavior, capability reporting, and the evidence returned
by the change when applicable.

## Validation

List the checks you ran and their results. Explain any standard check that does
not apply.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and matches the agreed issue or public contract.
- [ ] Tests cover new capability claims or behavior changes.
- [ ] Documentation reflects the actual supported behavior.
- [ ] No secrets, private paths, private-source artifacts, or internal project conventions are included.
- [ ] New dependencies or vendored files received license, security, and distribution review.
- [ ] Networked or AI-dependent behavior is opt-in and documented.
